prestazioni: Replace the original 0.7L 2U-B type air-cooled flat-twin engine with a fully balanced and blueprinted 1.0L 4U-C engine (from the Toyota Publica UP20), bored to 82mm and stroked to 94mm using a custom billet crankshaft by Tomei, achieving 1,000cc displacement. Pair with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold featuring dual 40mm Keihin FCR carburetors and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by HKS, tuned for a 12.5:1 compression ratio.

Install a custom lightweight flywheel by Fidanza (weighing 3.2kg) and a Sachs twin-disc clutch with cerametallic friction material, paired with a close-ratio 5-speed Toyota S80 transmission (from the Sports 800 P) reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential and custom billet aluminum shift forks by OS Giken.

Upgrade the suspension with a custom coilover kit by Tein (Type Flex Z) modified for the Sports 800 chassis, featuring 30-way adjustable dampers, 8kg/mm front springs, and 6kg/mm rear springs. Pair with polyurethane bushings by Whiteline for the front control arms and rear trailing arms, and install a custom front strut tower brace by Cusco (22mm diameter, 1.5mm wall thickness) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Replace the original steel body panels with a full carbon fiber replica body kit by Veilside (Sports 800-specific design), including a custom front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler, all finished in a matte clear coat with exposed carbon weave.

Install a custom interior featuring Recaro SRD bucket seats (Sports 800-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage by AutoPower (4-point, 1.75-inch diameter, 0.120-inch wall thickness) and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (330mm diameter) with a quick-release hub by NRG.

Upgrade the lighting with custom Hella Rallye 1300 headlights (7-inch diameter, Cibié bulbs) and LED taillights by Diode Dynamics, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Sports 800-specific design) and a set of 13-inch Enkei PF05 wheels (4x100 PCD, 15mm offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (165/50R13 front, 185/50R13 rear).
